_instructions: Owner guide: to add a photo, (1) drop the image file into /images/gallery/, then (2) add an entry to the "images" array below. Required: src (path under images/gallery/), alt (a short, descriptive sentence for SEO and screen readers), category (interior, exterior, or wheels), w and h (the image's pixel width and height, used to reserve space and avoid layout shift). Newest entries can go at the top. Keep alt text honest and specific.
